title: diasperus urinaria
intro: Diasperus urinaria, also known as the common horsetail or Equisetum arvense, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high silica content and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Diasperus urinaria include its ability to improve bone health, reduce arthritis symptoms, and support urinary system function. Diasperus urinaria can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also available in capsule or powder form for herbal supplements.
